news.title: UW–Madison’s Conroy publishes article in Voice and Speech Review
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Colleen Conroy, an assistant professor in the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama, is the author of an article in Voice and Speech Review.

news.title: School of Education graduate receives Ginsberg Family Award
news.summary_en: Rathika Murali, who graduated in May 2026 from the School of Education, has received a 2026 Ginsberg Family Award from UW–Madison Student Affairs.

news.title: Department of Theatre and Drama recognized at American College Theatre Festival
news.summary_en: UW–Madison students and productions from the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama received multiple honors at the American College Theatre Festival.

news.title: Five School of Education faculty honored with Vilas professorships and awards
news.summary_en: Five faculty from the School of Education have been honored with this year’s Vilas professorships and awards. The awards recognize outstanding research, teaching, and service.
